rule_text: The callout sits on the page/section background (usually White #ffffff). The blue box must be inset from the left by half the badge width (W/2) so the badge's outer half has room ('the box gets a little smaller on the left'). Everything else stays full content width.
intent: Guarantee room for the overhanging badge half.
summary: Callout on white (#ffffff) background, blue box inset left by half badge width (W/2) so outer badge half fits; other content full width.
